than FastAPI.

Lower is better

Methodology

wrk · 4 threads · 100 connections · 10s duration.
Single GET / returning JSON. TurboAPI on Python 3.14t (free-threaded).
FastAPI / Starlette / Flask on uvicorn + CPython 3.12.
Numbers are local — your hardware will differ.
